overview: Professional B2B showcase website for Lakshya Keshari's food processing machinery business in Varanasi. Displays 6 core machines with product details, contact info, and WhatsApp integration for lead generation.
features: Product catalog with 6 machines (Pizza oven, Spiral mixer, Planetary mixer, Automatic roti machine, Dough kneading machine, Sugarcane juice machine)
WhatsApp contact integration with pre-filled messages
Product detail cards with inquiry buttons
About section with owner info and location
Contact form and footer with full business info
